name: korean-ux-copy
description: Audit and improve user-facing Korean UX copy in codebases with optional Kanana-assisted rewrite candidates.

interface.shortDescription: Find and improve awkward Korean UX copy.
interface.longDescription: Audit Korean user-facing copy in codebases, classify UI surfaces, suggest product-context rewrites, and optionally use Kanana as a Korean rewrite provider with agent-side safety gates.
defaultPrompt: Audit this project's Korean UX copy. Do not edit files.
Find AI-like Korean copy and show safe dry-run diffs.
Use Kanana for high-impact Korean rewrite candidates.
